commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: "I am poor, and in toils from my youth up: and when lifted up, I was thrown down, and troubled" (ver. 15).

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh I am afflicted and ready to die from my youth up: while I suffer your terrors I am distracted. On the cross, or arrived at the years of manhood, (Berthier; Worthington) I have experienced the greatest contradictions. David was brought up in poverty, like our Saviour, and the exaltation of both was attended with great trials. (Berthier) The life of Christ was a continual martyrdom. (Menochius) He had all his sufferings in view from his first conception.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
